items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.description: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.description: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.description: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.description: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.description: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.description: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.description: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
